attributes.title: APM Overview
attributes.visState:
{"title":"APM Overview","type":"markdown","params":{"markdown":"# APM Overview

Use Kibana APM transaction views for throughput, error rate, and end-to-end latency across `signal_evaluation_cycle`, `place_order`, and `order_to_fill`.

Recommended views:
- Transaction throughput by minute
- Failed transaction rate split by transaction name
- Latency percentiles (p50/p95/p99) over 24h"},"aggs":[]}

attributes.title: LLM Latency Trends
attributes.visState:
{"title":"LLM Latency Trends","type":"markdown","params":{"markdown":"# LLM Call Latency

Track latency for Anthropic, OpenAI, and Gemini spans created by `call_claude`, `call_openai`, and the debate pipeline.

Recommended charts:
- `llm_response_ms` over time split by `labels.provider`
- Average latency by `labels.model`
- Error count by provider"},"aggs":[]}

attributes.title: Order Execution Latency
attributes.visState:
{"title":"Order Execution Latency","type":"markdown","params":{"markdown":"# Order Execution Latency

Use this panel to correlate `place_order` latency with `order_to_fill_ms`.

Recommended charts:
- `place_order` duration percentiles by market
- `order_to_fill_ms` over time
- Fill latency grouped by `labels.market_id`"},"aggs":[]}

attributes.title: Signal Pipeline Bottlenecks
attributes.visState:
{"title":"Signal Pipeline Bottlenecks","type":"markdown","params":{"markdown":"# Signal Pipeline Bottlenecks

Compare span latency across signal sources to find the slowest path.

Recommended charts:
- `calculate_vpin`, `calculate_ofi`, `debate_round`, `scan_lead_lag`, and `estimate_probability` duration percentiles
- Breakdown by `labels.operation`
- Top slow traces in the last 24h"},"aggs":[]}

attributes.title: Elastifund APM Overview
attributes.description: APM views for transaction throughput, error rate, LLM latency, order execution latency, and signal pipeline bottlenecks.
